ranked_repos.description: Production-grade CLI tool to parse, validate, and transform finite automata (determinization, minimization, recognition) with strong test coverage and clean architecture.
Audit any developer project ZIP (multi-stack, monorepo) and generate actionable Markdown/JSON/HTML reports with optional safe fixes.
Ultimate Tic-Tac-Toe web app with AI (Minimax, Alpha-Beta, MCTS), move analysis, heatmaps and game replay.
Full-stack smart waste monitoring app that classifies bin status from images, stores inspection history, and exposes analytics-ready data with Flask, Express, PostgreSQL, and HTML/CSS/JavaScript.
Premier League match prediction (Home Win) with Elo + form features, walk-forward backtesting, and Streamlit dashboard.
Python project implementing and benchmarking network flow algorithms (Ford-Fulkerson, Push-Relabel, Min-Cost Flow) with test cases, traces, plotting, and a Tkinter GUI.
Deck optimizer using trait synergies (pairs ≥2) and beam search — Clash Royale-inspired.
Streamlit app to simulate VCT EMEA Kickoff (2026) triple-elimination bracket and build an interactive worst→best team ranking.
A Vue.js frontend application starter with ESLint, Babel, and Tailwind CSS for scalable modern web development.

A Vue-based project with a Node.js backend serving dynamic content driven by `ingredients.json`. Built with `server.js`, package managed via npm. Seamlessly combines frontend (Vue, HTML, JS) and backend to deliver interactive UI backed by structured data.
Minimal HTML contact card / email signature with links (LinkedIn, GitHub).
Streamlit dashboard analyzing operational and environmental data related to electric school buses to support decision-making.

Signature email standardisée pour le Carré des Canotiers : templates HTML email-safe, assets versionnés, variantes (full/compact/texte) et guide d’intégration Gmail/Outlook + matrice de compatibilité.
2D arcade game prototype built with GameMaker Language.

A static web game project with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Includes multiple pages (game, quiz, tutorial, ranking), custom styles, interactive scripts, images, and a gameplay video to provide a complete browser-based experience.
Interactive Streamlit dashboard analyzing socio-demographic and digital factors influencing cultural consumption in France using open public data.

Cybersecurity project analyzing ANSSI advisories and CVEs with enriched datasets, Python scripts, and Jupyter notebooks. Includes data preprocessing, AI/game logic, and reports for vulnerability insights.

A Python project for sports and data analysis using multiple Excel files. Includes a main script and datasets to test, modify, and compute results, with IDE configuration files for easy development and reproducibility.
AI-powered Connect Four (12x6) with Minimax, alpha-beta pruning, heuristics, and real-time decision-making. Play against the AI in the console with strategic depth and optimized performance.
A simple web project with an HTML page styled by CSS and supported by image assets. It showcases sketches, photos, and logos, serving as a lightweight visual portfolio or presentation site.

Space-Jumper: a Python-based arcade game—built by Mathieu Alassoeur, Samuel Da Silva, Roland Fontanes, Max Bortolotti, and Raphaël Thebault. Run `main.py` to play. Features intuitive controls, scoring, images, and sound for an engaging experience.

Are you smarter than an algorithm? In this game, you're thrown into a maze. Take your time, analyze the path, then go for it and try to reach the exit as fast as possible. But be careful — you're not alone: three algorithms are racing with you… Will they be faster than you?

BoardSwipe is an interactive web application for board game enthusiasts, allowing users to discover, rate, and share games through a swipe-based system, while connecting with a community of passionate players.
